title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE DANAO CITY EMERGENCY HOSPITAL IN DANAO CITY, PROVINCE OF CEBU, FROM TWENTY-FIVE (25) TO FIFTY (50) BEDS, AND APPRORIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 16047 / 88 OG No. 26, 4118 (JUne 29, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7540, May 22, 1992 ]

AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE DANAO CITY EMERGENCY HOSPITAL IN DANAO CITY, PROVINCE OF CEBU, FROM TWENTY-FIVE (25) TO FIFTY (50) BEDS, AND APPRORIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The bed capacity of the Danao City Emergency Hospital in Danao City, Province of Cebu, is hereby increased from twenty-five (25) to fifty (50) beds.

SEC. 2. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be included in the General Appropriations Act of the year following its enactment into law.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on March 12, 1991 and November 25, 1991, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: May 22, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
